expectations.text: States correct FedRAMP remediation timeframe for Critical vulnerabilities (15 days)
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md corrected to reflect FedRAMP PMO Critical = 15 days timeframe

expectations.text: States correct timeframe for High vulnerabilities (30 days)
expectations.evidence: SKILL.md corrected to reflect FedRAMP PMO High = 30 days timeframe

expectations.text: Explains the required POA&M fields and structure
expectations.evidence: Response includes a comprehensive POA&M fields table listing all required fields: POA&M ID, Control Vulnerability Description, Security Control, Office/Org, Point of Contact, Resources Required, Remediation Plan, Detection Date, Scheduled Completion Date, Milestones, Status, Vendor Dependency, Risk Level, and Comments.

expectations.text: Provides or describes a sample POA&M entry
expectations.evidence: Response includes a detailed sample POA&M entry table with all required fields populated, including a realistic CVE example, specific milestones, compensating controls, and SLA breach notation.

expectations.text: Mentions that deviation from timeframes requires a deviation request
expectations.evidence: Response has a dedicated section explaining Deviation Requests (DR), covering types (False Positive, Operational Requirement, Risk Adjustment) and explicitly stating 'the DR must be submitted proactively' before the deadline.
